message:
refactor(tools): improve MCP tool implementations

Refine the MCP tool implementations for contacts, identity, messaging,
and reservations.

Changes:
- contacts.rs: Improved contact handling patterns
- identity.rs: Additional identity management capabilities
- messaging.rs: Enhanced message handling and validation
- reservations.rs: Refined file reservation logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
